channel.description: Be The Sovereign Individual You Want To See In The World

item.title: On the Wing
item.description: Another year concludes with mixed feelings.
item.content:encoded:
Another ending of a school year.
It is three days before returning home. The current reality is I can not precisely give an explan­ation as to why I am lingering over this place. For a large part, I have intended to go back home with one of my friends, through which I can absorb certain knowledge about how to copy with traveling along the way. Most of my past life were guided under others' wings and this time all I need is courage as well as confidence. When I informed my parents of my decision, it was not comforting to them, as I would be exposed to the night, which was kind of dangerous in their eyes. By assuring that I could manage to simply get it done, they let go of me. Sensing their anxiety over the phone, I was determined to have a go by myself .
Nonetheless, things prove to be more complicated after those wonderful sprees we all guys had been obseesd with. Wierdly, solitude is piercing my heart no matter how hard I want to escape.
Switching rooms came ahead, and to me, say, disappointment was overwhelming; but the bond never die. "Bros for life !" was inspiring with a different meaning. At the same time, after the class get-together several days ago, where we were delightedly indulging ourselves with endless cheers, it is the first time our class united as one, ignoring what impressions we had left in school. With several rounds of beer served, my head began to spin. But in front of everyone, I had to stay conscious all the time. After all, it was also the last one chance. Being spectacular, the MTV showdown once again traced everyone's unusual road in the past year. Intoxication was all over us. Proudly, I claim myself to be one of Our Glorious Class Four. Our class is not an obscurity regardless of evaluation from outside. In short, many thanks to all my classmates for everything we had shared. Benevolence will spring up as long as we keep chasing the initial ambitions in our hearts.
Emptiness floods inside these days. Wandering alone, I am senstive to the surroundings. I still can not have a clue with my mind unsettling. Saviouring such a life the hard way, which I have never encountered before. Constantly, I was beaten by the thought and admitted that hope blew me off. The more efforts I put in recovering, the less intact my life is. What I am trying to do is to dissipate loneliness and seek the lost self. But right now this feeling hurts every time I recollect those beautiful momeries. Perhaps the best option for me is to leave it to Time, as we all concede that Time is the best medicine that heals all wounds.
Been There, Done That! Conclusion for my freshmen year ...
Being someone truly alive. Dreams of the future...

item.title: Pilgrimage
item.description: Reality is always intimidating, however, life is fantastic all the time.
item.content:encoded:
Time is always elapsing quietly and ruthlessly. A really long span since I renewed the last self-exposure. Admittedly, hardly can I recollect the mood when it dates back to the previous journal as the revolving routine has been constantly engaged me in the seemingly endless work. Well, I have no clue as to why now is the time to reveal myself. Maybe part of the reason lies in the recent series of incidents which I have gone through, or maybe the reason is as simple as the fact that no one wants to be silent in most cases, even when he considers himself to be a rather introvert person.
Firstly, I simply propose to clarify one thing before the theme unfolds: quite a few friends have complained to me in one way or another that I may challenge their understanding with so many obscure words, thus creating difficulties when they intend to get to know what's happening. Anyway, truly thank you for your sincere feelings about me. My answer is fairly brief. I am not showing off and claiming my abilities to be superior. Just think for a moment: when you have taken your capacity to the next level, you are definitely eager to exhibit what you have obtained because it is a way to prove yourself to some extent. Nothing particular indeed. Therefore, I persist with my choice.
Seems I said too much about petty stuff. Time to go back to the point. The humiliating contest may be the primary underlying factor for revelation at the beginning. I was somehow both expecting for a presence at the finale and discarding the triumphant news. A paradox, so to speak, really perplexed me now that it was my debut on a formal English oral competition. I had to say the result was satisfying my original expectation, but the embrassing scenario haunted me for several days. The moment I stepped down the stage, I felt an overwhelming frustration chilled my body for the whole class had sacrificed enough to help me. Although the phase is over, I keep reminding myself to persevere to the end no matter what the result was. The lesson is quite instructive: life is a matter of successive accumulation so that we need to move on.
The absence of a roommate is another element that constitutes lonliness. Spending some days on my own is not a difficult task, but the atmosphere seems too oppressive and desolated. Who would have imagined that before, a scene where you have to be alone without others' companion? It is so weird that the incident has given me much thought about the attitude when I perceive friendship. I just want to pose a question to whoever reads this article: Who would like to regard me as a friend given the truth that I may not be an ideal one to befriend with? Truth or happiness, never both. Actually, I can not help missing my old buddies, both those who had shared the past and those who are firmly standing by me now, and I am whole-heartedly grateful for everything exclusive. Sometimes I am not so courageous and brave enough at all to face the world alone. Reality is always intimidating, however, life is fantastic all the time.
Presumably, I have dragged this topic to an irrelevent angle, whereas the word"pilgrimage" is much more meaningful than a simple interpretation. The journey of life perhaps covers all the possibilities. In the end, it is my hope that everyone takes his unique path to the glamourous opposite side.

item.title: 2024: A Year in Review
item.description: Putting all my highlights on DEFI, Trading, NFTs & Reflections. Forever grateful to anyone following his dreams and making it. Be your own boss.
item.content:encoded:
Proud to say I've surpassed my goal in this bull run.
Portfolio (+222%) outperforms $BTC (+116%).
We've all come a long way and it's better to know yourself early.
So I have lower expectations and just enjoy the Year of $SNEK.
Time to wrap up 2024.
## PORTFOLIO
I've underestimated what $BTC EFT will bring to the market in January and bought back higher.
$SNEK is my biggest conviction play after I thought everything through in April when the market was in red.
Already told my story before it took off.
Grateful I was give enough time to build my positions again.
Still kept a small position of USDT for the celebration of this 2024.
A part of that was tied to my position in Gamefi.
## TRADING
1. $BOME
Learned Solana memecoin craze from @TGTAlpha and hit another one with $BOME for 250 SOL (50x) in March.
After three sleepless nights, I was finally out of this craze.
It was the peak of the market when it was listed in @binance.
2. $DOG & Runestone
Runestone was airdropped and I bought more for $DOG.
Held through the top and tough days from March to December.
I decided to clear all position after $BTC broke 100k.
My previous theses are broken after the market moves.
Bitcoin can represent the Free and Fair movement and $DOG merely outperforms $BTC since inception.
Made a 2x after 8 months of hodling and buying the dip.
3. PYTH/TIA/PEPE/RONIN
I bought these narratives in February and sold all in May.
Expect for PEPE, it was an aweful experience holding these tokens and I fell for the hype.
Made a handsome profit from $PEPE.
4. Memecoin PVPs
I was wondering where it is the best place to bet.
Wandering in all SOL/BASE/BLAST/ETH ecosystems from April to June, I could hardly be the survivor after all the battles.
I did make profit from NIKE and OMNI in June as the memecoin craze was back on Cardano.
Turns out I was not fit for any of these schemes.
## AIRDROPS
1. $ENA
Lucky to participate in Season 1 and earned over 19k $ENA for over 10k USDT in April.
Had plans to hodl but after the suspicious activities from the team, I was out after a week.
Though it has some interesting designs, I stay away from this so-called gem.
2. $ME
Claimed my ME after multiple trades in Ordinal and Runes in December.
Sold my airdrop for another 9k USDT and put it back to $SNEK.
## DEFI
I was thrilled after I found out how to leverage @levvyfinance and @LenfiOfficial at the start of 2024.
It served me well when things were hot, but I was defeated by the defaults and market shift.
I reflected what I had in Cardano ecosystem and decided to stay out right before the rate cuts.
I also cut losses on $Lenfi / $HUNT / $CTV and sold all CNTs in April.
It was painful to hold any except for $SNEK.
## NFTs
I liquidated most assets again and only HODL what I love in July.
It's hard to swallow but I have to fight against my emotions.
After months of unrational decisions, we are just normal guys throwing money on things we love.
I just don't wanna mess up this time.
## SOCIAL GROWTH
- X followers grow from 2k to 5.1k in 2024 - Became a mod in @snek Chinese Community (100 -> 2k) - Earned $SNEK badge - Wrote and translated different content for the community.

item.title: 2015 VS 2025
item.description: I genuinely believe we're entering an era where the friction between idea and execution is disappearing. The bottleneck isn't resources anymore. It's whether you have something worth building and the patience to train your tools.
item.content:encoded:
Ten years ago I started as a product manager at a startup.
In two years, I taught myself everything about understanding demands, building product mockups, navigating disagreements between marketing and engineering, learning to speak everyone's language. It was exhausting but I loved it because I could see my ideas come to life
But 2025 hit different. I'm building again and it feels like those early days except better. Every random idea that pops into my head can actually become real now. No convincing a dev team. No waiting on design resources.
Just me and my AI assistants making things happen.
The catch is you need to learn how to work with AI the same way I learned to work with engineers back then. It's a skill. You can't just throw prompts at it and expect magic.
But once you figure it out? You're unstoppable.
I genuinely believe we're entering an era where the friction between idea and execution is disappearing. The bottleneck isn't resources anymore. It's whether you have something worth building and the patience to train your tools.
What's stopping you from building that thing you've been thinking about?

item.title: 2023: A Year in Review
item.description: Putting all my highlights on DEFI, Trading, NFTs & Reflections. Forever grateful to anyone following his dreams and making it. Be your own boss.
item.content:encoded:
## DEFI
As bull seems nearer, I change some of my DEFI plays and rotate ADA into lending and low-risk ones.
It's time to wrap up my 2023.
Realized Profits: 5k + 4.2k + 5.1k = 14.3k ADA
### DEFI Plays from @Indigo_protocol
Position: 437 INDY (Staking) Harvested Gains: 5k
Closed my iUSD/iBTC CDP a week ago and debt-free now.
As $INDY doesn't get more love from the market, my position is set for now.
It goes back to March and ends here.
### Lending in @FluidTokens & @levvyfinance
Position: FT: Lent 64k ADA; Levvy: Lent 120k ADA
Harvested Gains: 4.2k ADA
I caught up with Cardano DEFI Summer by borrowing from NFTs and become a free lender now.
It's my focus whether it's for buying back or nterest.
### Liquidity Farmning in @MinswapDEX & Vyfi
Position: 11k ADA/CTV Harvested Gains: 5.1k ADA + 100k SNEK + 40k CTV
LP helps me when new dex comes up and I'm able to capture the momentum.
It boostraps my DEFI plays though I miscalculated returns and added LP in July.
I cann't speak too highly of how these platforms innovate and change the landscape of Cardano DEFI.
It's an amazing journey from a rookie to an intermediary.
There are more that I'd love to experience in 2024, like @OptimFi.
More coming.
## Trading
Before May, I didn't try anything else except for staking and LP.
Here we are with all those shiny projects building on Cardano and handsome tools.
Perspective changes as time goes by.
Realized Profits: 112k ADA
### Biggest Winners
1. $SNEK
Thanks to SNEK, I've learned as much as possible in this new narrative.
I've shared my thoughts on recent volatility and how I reacted.
Realized Profits: 76k ADA (125%)
2. $IAG
I'm so delighted to find this gem on Cardano that I can ditch Filecoin in my portfolio.
Didn't know much at first but understood the power of decentralized storage now.
I've been in swing trading and have a nice position now.
Realized Profits: 15k ADA (75%)
3. $XVFYI
It's another hyped concept since inception of the dex.
Vyfi has provided a bunch of new features but the innovations are dwarfed by others.
I'm happy to HODL but things got worse and had to exit and went back to ADA.
Realized Profits: 7.2k ADA (20%)
4. $OPT
With due respect, I don't like anything that Museli team has claimed and when new alphas drops, I stayed up late for the presale and went on multiple trades for more ADA.
It's about derivatives but beyond my understanding.
Realized Profits: 5k ADA (40%)
5. $HUNT
To my regret, I cut loss at the launch and gradually learned the power of aggragator and the capabilities team has brought to the ecosystem.
I picked up more after fading four months.
Realized Profits: 2.5k ADA (10%)
### Biggest Losers
1. $INDY
Convinced at the sythentics at the first but had to go with the tide and sold my position before it dumps more.
It relates to the dilution and all the rewards from profiteers opening CDPs.
Realized Loss: 3k ADA (-20%)
2. $WMT
It has a got nice start with IOG but the real-fi plays are hard to predict in different jurisdictions and ppl love overnight generational wealth.
It loses favor in this bear market but I do hope it will come back in full.
Realized Loss: 2k ADA (-50%)
There are more trades this year and I just don't wanna list all.
I've done pretty well and I'm happy with that.
What I've learnt from this bear market is never stop grinding.
Calculate all things first before hitting the button.
More gifts coming next year.
Cheers.
## NFTs
It's been a brutal year for NFTs and I cann't escape the falling dome as well.
The rising Bitcoin ecosystem is devouring while others are suffering.
Whatever happens, I'm here to stay.
Realized Profits: 15k ADA + 0.91 BTC - 10 ETH
1. Cardano
The teeming DEFI Summer in May marks the turnaround of NFTs and I haven't realized it until it's too late.
I still holds the top collections like SpaceBudz, Clay Nation, OreMob, ADAHandles but liquidate most of the low-value ones that I once believed in.
It's heartbreaking when your faith shatters and there are no community around if we only focus on the FP.
Though I was lucky to borrow liquidity from high-value NFTs to speed up, the problem is not Cardano alone and NFTs need better narratives to go on.
The rise of Utility NFTs is a lot of fun and I'm happy to have some promising ones.
The correction is also tough to swallow for many when new memecoins launched a week ago did another 10x.
That's the cycle and I have to accept the truth.
2. Ethereum
Didn't look back once I sold all I had and lost over 10 ETH.
It was my beginning phase when I wanna try more last April.
Look at where we are with the top ones except for Punks.
It's a gamble but I don't see we truly have loyal community & great leadership.
3. Bitcoin Ordinals
The oldest blockchain with insriptions is the biggest winner in this bear market.
The reason of shift goes back to being the first and original blockchain and ppl love this fundamental fact.
I was lucky to experiment and hit the jackpot of @MNCHRMSBTC.
The largest x I could ever have with sizeable position.
The story is quite interesting and I'm just glad diamond hands deserves the win.
There are brighter days to come and I'll be forever grateful.
4. Polygon & Arbitrum
I probabaly will learn more about other chains in 2024 thanks to my friends who are experts in Web3 Gaming.
It's where we met and the ups-and-downs are just tiny waves in our great journey.
They are the leaders and I'm happy to ride with my liquidity.
## Reflections
It's pretty interesting that I grind and summarize about investment, Cardano, crypto or NFTs.
The habit goes a long way and they are my treasure when I lose sight of direction.
The Diaries end but my journey continues.

item.title: 2025: A Year of Transformation, Turbulence, and New Beginnings
item.description: 2025 taught me that the most valuable asset isn't in your portfolio—it's your ability to adapt, learn, and maintain relationships through chaos.
item.content:encoded:
## Introduction: When Everything You Knew Changed
Have you ever lived through a year that completely reshaped your understanding of markets, money, and what truly matters?
2025 was that year for me—and likely for millions of others navigating the financial landscape. From the moment of Trump's administration taking office to the seismic shifts across crypto, traditional markets, and personal life, this year demanded adaptation, resilience, and a willingness to let go of old certainties. I'm still amazed at how profoundly this single year altered both the industry and my personal journey.
Trapped between various cycle theories and exhausted narratives, our industry stands at the threshold of a new chapter. Here's my honest reflection on what this transformative year taught me.
## The Crypto Rollercoaster: Humility in a Volatile Market
### Bitcoin: The Ultimate Generation Handoff
Unfortunately, the crypto market delivered mediocre performance throughout 2025. Compared to last year's confidence and momentum, BTC traced a complete circle, SNEK returned to its launch point, and my crypto portfolio plummeted over 50% from its peak. Painful? Absolutely. Surprising? Not really.
But here's what shifted in my understanding of Bitcoin: **it's a product of our new era**, with consensus unmatched since its birth. What young people chase, we must pay attention to. Its entry into mainstream society through ETFs represents the ultimate changing of hands—a generational wealth transfer. The consistent ETF net inflows still guarantee substantial potential upside.
**Key realization**: Sometimes the best investment thesis isn't about the price—it's about understanding whose hands the asset is moving into.
### SNEK & ADA: Betting on People, Not Just Prices
As I reviewed in my previous article, my SNEK and ADA logic remains unchanged. I don't obsess over price action. **I care about people**—always have, always will. I'm thrilled that the team continues pushing forward with improving fundamentals.
My hope? To find another project comparable to SNEK—a second venture worthy of my full commitment. If you know of one, let's talk.
## Trading Lessons: From Diamond Hands to Strategic Flexibility
### The Whiplash of Early 2025
I set a clear 2025 goal: **only sell, don't buy**. I didn't have time to track additional coins anyway.
Then came the tsunami: Trump launched his own token, followed by tariff bombshells, culminating in strategic reserve approval. Those first four months delivered the most intense emotional volatility I've witnessed in markets. You couldn't help but marvel: "So this is how the game is played now."
I'd been a diamond-hands holder for too long. I wasn't adapting to market changes, and my mindset became unbalanced. I reduced positions moderately to relieve pressure.
**Here's the truth**: Traders can shift styles easily. Investors? We suffer. My original thesis hadn't changed—the market just became too fragile to support it.
### Finding Balance Through Strategy
Between June and August, I took a break. When I returned, I studied Wang's trading strategies and philosophy. People who can truly separate emotion from trading are rare gems.
As markets warmed up again, I executed several swing trades on BTC and DOGE, ultimately banking 4,000 USDT before stepping back.
**Lesson learned**: There's wisdom in knowing when to be a holder and when to be a trader. The market doesn't care about your identity—only your adaptability matters.
## Diversification: Gold and Stocks Enter the Picture
### Gold: Trading the Era, Not the Metal
I formally established my gold position in October. Let me be clear: **I have no faith in gold itself**. This was purely strategic—following a system, understanding what this era is actually trading.
Result? Approximately 5,000 USDT profit (8% return) so far.
### Stocks: Learning What "Comfortable in Any Market" Actually Means
Watching US stocks surge in early 2025 made me anxious. Contradictory indicators prevented me from deploying significant capital, so I liquidated previous positions. When April's recovery arrived, I spent over a month deeply understanding asset allocation and what it truly means to be comfortable whether markets rise or fall.
**My approach now**: - **Daily dollar-cost averaging into AI and tech stocks** in a dedicated account I don't actively monitor - **Long-term conviction**: China and the US remain global leaders in the foreseeable future - **Gold serves as a hedge** during this transitional period of great transformation - **Managing family retirement funds** with a trusted investment manager for long-term holdings
This shift from reactive trading to systematic allocation brought the peace of mind I'd been seeking.
## Building Presence: Social Media Growth
Despite market turbulence, I focused on consistent value creation:
**X (Twitter)**: 6.4k Followers (+1.3k growth) with 5.7 Million Impressions earned
**Binance Square**: 217 Posts, 114 Followers, and 143.9k Views
These numbers represent more than vanity metrics—they reflect genuine connections and shared learning experiences with a growing community.
## Personal Transformation: The Freedom Chapter
### From Business Owner to Free Agent
The most significant change wasn't in my portfolio—it was in my life structure.
I dove deep into AI, evolving from complete novice to independently completing projects in just one month (December to present). **My proudest achievement?** Building my personal website in three days, iterating continuously, and gaining confidence to tackle other technical challenges.
My partner and I transferred our music school to family management and both stepped away from traditional employment. We're now self-employed freelancers. Our little one started kindergarten, and since October, our family of three has embraced a nomadic lifestyle—living and traveling on our terms.
### Rediscovering Reflection
I've returned to daily journaling, finally making time to think deeply and organize years of accumulated experiences. The valuable insights I'm now sharing publicly emerged from this practice.
I'm grateful for my Snekified avatar upgrade, which inspired me to refresh my personal brand and repackage my best content for wider distribution.
## Key Takeaways: Wisdom from a Year of Upheaval
Let me distill what 2025 taught me:
1. **Markets don't owe you consistency**—your strategies must evolve with changing conditions
2. **People matter more than prices**—invest in teams and communities, not just tickers
3. **Diamond hands and trading hands serve different purposes**—know which role the moment demands
4. **True diversification isn't just assets**—it's strategies, timeframes, and emotional approaches
5. **Freedom requires letting go**—of businesses, beliefs, and the need to control outcomes
6. **Daily systems beat sporadic brilliance**—whether in DCA investing or journaling
7. **Technical skills compound quickly**—what seems impossible becomes routine with focused effort
8. **Community is currency**—genuine connections matter more than follower counts
## Your Turn: Reflect and Act
As we move beyond 2025's lessons, I invite you to consider:
- **Which of your investment theses survived this year intact? Which crumbled?** - **Are you trading your identity or trading the market in front of you?** - **What would your portfolio look like if you optimized for peace of mind instead of maximum returns?** - **What skills could you master in 30 days if you committed fully?**
## Final Thoughts: Embracing the Unknown Chapter
The industry stands at the threshold of something new. The old narratives are exhausted. The cycles we once trusted have broken down.
And somehow, that's exactly where opportunity lives.
2025 taught me that **the most valuable asset isn't in your portfolio—it's your ability to adapt, learn, and maintain relationships through chaos**. Whether crypto recovers, gold continues its run, or AI stocks justify their valuations matters less than whether you've built the resilience and diversification to thrive regardless.
I don't know what 2026 holds. But I know I'm more equipped to handle it than I was twelve months ago—financially, technically, and emotionally.
That's the real return on investment.
---
*What was your biggest lesson from 2025? I'd love to hear your story. Share in the comments or reach out directly—let's learn from each other as we write the next chapter together.*
**If this resonated with you, consider reviewing your own year with similar honesty. The insights might surprise you.**

item.title: What I Learned Watching My Mother Fade
item.description: We think time moves fast. It doesn't—we just lose the capacity to process it. This New Year, that truth hit me harder than expected.
item.content:encoded:
## The Setup
My mother has bipolar disorder.
Not the dramatic Hollywood version. The real kind—thirty years of cycles, some measured in months, others in years. The kind where you learn to read the weather patterns of another person's mind, never knowing which version of them you'll get at breakfast.
The decade after I graduated college was our quiet window. Her longest stable period since I was a child. I thought we'd earned something. That maybe, finally, the tide had gone out for good.
I was wrong.
## The Fall
At sixty, the brain can't buffer what it used to.
The episodes last longer now. The recovery is thinner. The person who emerges on the other side is slightly less herself than before.
I watch her struggle and feel two things at once: grief and rage. Grief for what she's losing. Rage at my own helplessness. Neither emotion helps her. Neither helps me.
This New Year home, I realized something I didn't want to admit: the mother I knew—the one from that stable decade—isn't coming back. We're in a new phase now. One where I need to be the buffer, the processor, the one who carries what she can't.
## The Break
I've rationalized this for years.
COVID broke something in all of us, but it fractured something specific in her. The isolation, the disruption to routine, the generalized anxiety of those years—it found the cracks in her foundation and widened them.
Last year, I bottomed out harder than I wanted to admit. The depression I'd managed for years finally caught up. There were days I didn't want to get out of bed. Days I understood, in a way I never had before, why some people choose to exit early.
Not because they don't love their families. Not because they're selfish.
Because the weight becomes mathematically unbearable. Because you start doing the calculus: years of suffering ahead vs. the pain you'd cause by leaving. And some days, the math almost makes sense.
I didn't. Obviously. I'm here, writing this.
But I understand now why my mother cycles the way she does. Why the brain, when overloaded, starts looking for emergency exits. Why sometimes the only response to overwhelming pain is to shut down, dissociate, disappear into the fog.
## The Lesson
Here's what nobody tells you about watching a parent age:
**You're not just losing them. You're becoming them.**
I see my mother's patterns in myself now. The cycles of energy and collapse. The tendency to buffer overwhelming emotion with shutdown. The way stress manifests not as anxiety but as dissociation—as checking out because checking in hurts too much.
The brutal truth is this: genetics is probability, not destiny. But probability compounds over time. And at forty, I'm starting to see the compound interest on whatever genetic and environmental factors shaped her brain.
## What I'm Doing Differently
I can't fix my mother. The medical system can't either—not fully, not permanently.
But I can build systems that might keep me from following the same trajectory.
**Physical buffer:** Exercise isn't optional anymore. It's maintenance. The days I move are the days I can think clearly.
**Social buffer:** Isolation is the enemy. I need people who can see me clearly, who can tell me when I'm cycling, when I'm starting to drift.
**Cognitive buffer:** Meditation, therapy, medication when needed. Tools to process what my mother's brain couldn't.
**Time buffer:** The most precious resource. Saying no to things that don't matter so I have capacity for what does. Being present with my daughter in a way my mother often couldn't be with me.
## The Weight
You think acceptance comes with age.
It doesn't. You just get different at carrying the weight.
My mother carried hers for thirty years before the structure started to fail. I've been carrying mine for twenty. I have time to build better foundations, but not unlimited time.
Every year, the weight gets heavier or my capacity gets stronger. There's no third option.
## What I'm Building
This is why I write. Why I share. Why I build in public.
Not because I have answers. Because I'm searching for them in real-time, and maybe my search helps someone else's.
The systems I'm building—financial, physical, cognitive, social—aren't just for me. They're for my daughter. So she doesn't have to watch me fade the way I'm watching my mother fade.
So she doesn't have to feel that particular grief-rage combination at forty. Or thirty. Or ever.
## The Question
I don't know what this year will bring. Whether my mother will stabilize again or continue this slow drift. Whether I'll maintain my own systems or let them decay under pressure.
I don't know if "happily ever after" is a real thing or just a narrative convenience.
But I know this: the work matters. The daily, unglamorous work of maintenance. Of showing up. Of building systems that can carry more than you think you can bear.
**How do you hold your weight?**
I'm genuinely asking. Because I'm still learning. Still building. Still here.
Stay Invested in the Game. 🐍
---
*February 2026 | New Year reflections*

item.title: 2025 年终复盘：SNEK 静待花开
item.description: 若你是因为除了创始团队外的任何人看好而投资买入，请重新审视一遍自己的逻辑，而且要持续去做这件事，暴富故事只存在于报道，成功是因为你每时每刻都在验证，希望你有本事活得开心。
item.content:encoded:
最近听到最多的话题就是 Snek 价格。
2025 年即将结束，加密市场的表现实在是让人大跌眼镜。
群里依旧热闹，人来人往，希望写篇文章为各位打气。
那就分别从 ADA 和 Snek 的叙事聊聊各自影响。
再次强调，这不是投资建议，这是复盘我自己的投资逻辑，请为自己的投资决定负责。
## ADA 叙事
**1、美国政策与 Charles，例如 ADA 加密战略储备**
政策不断向好，战略储备消息出来了，按照 Charles 的话说，我们都被川普政府「骗」了。我倒觉得这很正常，每个人都有自己的利益考量，我能看到的是，加密行业转向合规，这个行业的各个生态位都要发生变化，真正能存活下来的项目屈指可数（结论：喜忧参半）
**2、Cardano ETF**
Grayscale 申请的 ETF 到现在没有动静，他们实际上非常主动，也多次宣传 Cardano，中间经历政府停摆，反倒是其他项目上线很快，第一个独立的 ETF 至关重要。虽说 Cardano 作为行业前十在各种指数里也能沾光，但希望接下来能尽快步伐（结论：依旧成立）
**3、稳定币引入与拓展**
一年来都没有结果，如今 Emurgo 非常积极，CEO 也分享了近期目标，加上最近的 7000 万 ADA 提案，似乎一切都在向好发展，不过仔细想想就明白了为什么他们现在才开始行动，以前的种种不作为在一些利好消息下大家都忘了（结论：等待检验）
**4、跨链合作，例如 Bitcoin 等**
热闹再一次落幕了，吃亏的只有盲目相信 Charles 任何承诺的持币者，从 BitcoinOS 的募资闹剧开始，下半年更是没有多少声音。社区项目倒是有很多实现出了跨链支持，只是期待的完全不同（结论：证伪）
**5、头部代币上一线交易所，例如 Snek**
这是今年最大的进步，Snek、Iagon 等优质项目得到了头部交易所支持，打开了流动性大门，至少为了市场转暖提供了条件，也间接促进了生态交易量和活跃度，而且接下来还要继续冲击更大的舞台（结论：成立）
**6、MidnightNtwrk 空投**
12 月 NIGHT 终于上线了，Charles 把生态注意力都放在新项目上，隐私赛道也进去了，参与挖矿的多了，头部交易所开展工作，生态交易量上升，基础设施也打好了，这是有利于生态发展的，可是很少人会思考，这对于 ADA 到底有什么影响，ADA 的价值到底在哪里，有兴趣的可以看看两者这些天的价格对比，多的我就不评价了（结论：喜忧参半）
**7、Cardano 链上治理**
这一年的链上治理还是要给予正面评价的，谁都希望机制做得更好。通过 8 月的 Snek 提案到最终完整拿到 500 万 ADA 贷款这一过程，多数人还是理解利弊，当然现在还是三大实体说了算，Snek 能在这样的环境下拿到钱本身就是证明。倘若近期的关键设施提案能够通过并且切实执行，这也算是一种慰藉（结论：成立）
**8、商业项目成功**
这一年看下来，真正帮助生态破局的优质项目现在只有 Midnight, Snek, Iagon，Strike 这些，他们都在努力做好自己的事情，Midnight 刚上线不予置评，后面的项目活得足够久，团队也持续付出，有完整的商业模式，希望能打开更多的空间（结论：成立）
## Snek 叙事
**1、2025 年是农历蛇年**
新年前宣布上线 Kraken 交易所绝对意想不到， 10 月份 Token2049 亚洲之行凝聚了资源，年末的 Snek Den 台湾站圆满收官，这一方面有得有失，精力有限，放在交易所上币是正确，借助文化营销进一步扩大影响力差强人意。
**2、Cardano 链上市值与交易量第一的生态代币与模因币**
从去年 11 月登顶后，Snek 一直稳居第一，无论是每日交易量、历史交易量、借贷抵押等领域，直到 Night 上线才让出位置，第一名是占据用户心智的重要因素，对于不了解 Midnight 和 Cardano 关系的人来说，它们的定位是比较模糊的，Snek 作为模因品牌，我更希望它是独立自主不断壮大的全球模因品牌，帮助 Cardano 只是理念之一，真正有实力能暴涨的时候，没人会关心主链是什么。
**3、信仰 ADA 的永不爆仓杠杆，市值潜力大**
仔细观察这一年的 Snek/ADA 对价，除了 10/11 历史大事件影响外，走势还是很惊喜的，我的目标从来都是跑赢 ADA，6-8 月份的回暖也是另一种证明。
当然你要问我为什么近期跌跌不休，Midnight 有利有弊，它帮助打通平台的技术整合，新上线前期交易量也大，顺势 Snek 也能借助流动性做市赚钱，现在也有贷款也到手了，先在 Bybit 和 OKX 上币，然后继续扩大影响力，Snek 整体交易量上升一个台阶，再搞定后面那些。
再用经济学来说，价格是需求和供给的函数，年底行情疲弱，买单不够强烈，也没有一定要紧急买入的理由，毕竟拿到贷款不等于正式上线，供给就是鲸鱼换手，非常理解每一位持币者，谁也不容易，特别是这几年都努力拿着的朋友，我能给出的建议就是「你的持仓让你能够好好睡觉」。
**4、全球模因品牌，独特文化基因**
这一方面表现有目共睹，Snek 团队多次升级品牌形象，包括推出统一的 3D 角色模型，便于动画、艺术、商品和媒体应用；更新了 Youtube、Instagram、Tiktok 等社交平台；并且推出了 Snek Figures 与后续与 JCorp 合作的实体产品。
2025 年 Snek 继续向可持续全球品牌转型的步伐稳健，结合文化共鸣、产品扩展和 Cardano支持争取做到 IP 前列。
**5、公平发售、团队零分配、代币全流通**
独特的代币分配是项目发展的基石，团队有条不紊，也是真金白银投入的，最近 Rami 个人购买与团队购买为上所做准备都可以证明。这一点大多数币代币设计是不可能的，作为对比你可以查下 Pengu 团队他们的做法。至于钱从哪里来，这每一个项目必经之路，到现在也是按照去年写过的路线在走。
**6、顶级运营，产品丰富，定期回购销毁**
这方面和前面有些类似，Snek 官方号增加了更多互动，再观察 Goofy 和 Rami 他们两位发推的风格和内容，说到做到是做人最难的品质。
至于通缩，今年一直在回购，只是近期暂停了销毁，我也提出过建议：销毁是对全部持有者有利，除非交易量保持很高水平，我更希望激励长期持有者，质押奖励是很简单的方式，期待后续。
**7、社区共识强大，经历多次洗盘**
链上持币人数从巅峰减少了 1000 多人，市场环境使然，不过我们不了解各大交易所的持币者，刚才看了下 Kraken 的数据分析，大概每周 4000 人次交易 Snek/USD，按照交易市场排名预估，每天通过 CEX 交易 Snek 的人数应该超过 5000 人。
前面也分析过需求与供给情况，洗盘是必要的，每个阶段对持币人的认知要求都不同，市场买卖自由，做好仓位和风险管理就好。你也可以观察，群里最热闹，情绪最激动的时候，几乎就是触底信号。今年已经有很多次了，现在大家不还是好好活着么？
## 投资感悟
1. 大多数人对 BTC 没有任何信仰，对其他东西也是一样，他们的目的只是有钱能花，如果你真正喜欢什么东西，你享受拥有它的每一天，你就不会总盯着价格，什么时候要买要卖了，前提还是你知道自己要什么、有什么、要付出什么，任何东西都有赚钱的方法，关键你自己有没有本事赚钱。
2. 从 ETF 和今年川普上台后我就想过，加密逻辑已经变了，现在把 Snek 当成普通项目也很好，我投的还是人，毕竟我对其他公司没有那么了解，不期待一次性暴涨多少倍，我可以等很长时间，至于其他选项无非就是中美股指数和黄金了。
3. 若你是因为除了创始团队外的任何人看好而投资买入，请重新审视一遍自己的逻辑，而且要持续去做这件事，暴富故事只存在于报道，成功是因为你每时每刻都在验证，希望你有本事活得开心。

item.title: I Stopped Screening Projects the Normal Way. Here's What I Built Instead.
item.description: Most frameworks look professional but filter out the best projects. So I reverse-engineered my own — starting from what actually survived.
item.content:encoded:
Most crypto investors screen projects top-down. Start with the hottest narrative, filter by market cap, check the team's LinkedIn, skim the tokenomics.
I did that for years. It didn't work.
Not because the method was wrong — because the ruler was wrong for what I was trying to measure.
---
## The Problem With Borrowed Frameworks
In 2024, I ran a standard due diligence pass on my own portfolio. The result was absurd.
By traditional VC criteria — clear revenue model, star-team pedigree, measurable traction — half my highest-conviction holdings would have been filtered out on day one.
SNEK? Community meme coin. No company. No revenue. DOG on Runes? Same story. Bitcoin itself? No CEO, no quarterly earnings, no roadmap.
These aren't edge cases. They're the backbone of my portfolio. And they survived multiple bear markets while "proper" projects with polished decks quietly died.
The framework was rejecting the evidence.
So I flipped the process.
---
## Reverse-Engineering Conviction
Instead of starting with theory, I started with fact.
I took six projects I've held through at least one full cycle — **Bitcoin, Cardano, SNEK, Ergo, DOG (Runes), Oremob** — and asked a simple question:
> What do these have in common that made me hold through 80% drawdowns?
Not what they look like on paper. What they actually share at a structural level.
Something interesting emerged. All six share a common DNA: - Every one is either core infrastructure or community-native. - None of them won on marketing. They won on persistence. - Every single one survived at least one bear market where 90% of their peers didn't come back.
No AI agent platforms. No hype-cycle darlings. No projects that launched into a bull and haven't been tested yet.
The answer became a four-dimension framework. Not because four is a magic number — because these were the only four things that consistently predicted whether I'd still be holding a year later.
---
## The Four Dimensions
### 1. Team — Or Whatever Functions As One
I stopped requiring a traditional team. What I require is **sustained builder energy through a bear market**.
That can look like: - A core dev team shipping code when nobody's watching (Ergo, Cardano) - A community that self-organizes and keeps producing content, tools, governance (SNEK, DOG) - A solo builder or small team grinding through irrelevance (Oremob)
The test is simple: **Were they building when the price was down 80%?**
If yes, they pass. If they only show up during bull runs, they don't — regardless of their resume.
One thing I've noticed across all six: none of them had a "marketing moment" that made me buy. I found them because someone was building something real and wouldn't shut up about it — even when nobody was listening.
### 2. Community — Quality Over Quantity, Always
Follower count is noise. I look at three things:
**Bear market survival.** Is the community still active when there's no financial incentive to be? SNEK's Discord stayed alive through the worst of 2023. Most projects' communities evaporated.
**Organic interaction.** Are people talking because they care, or because there's an airdrop? You can feel the difference in five minutes.
**Cultural identity.** The strongest communities have something that goes beyond price. SNEK has "In SNEK We Trust." Bitcoin has sovereign money. Cardano has vibrant community. It's an identity, not just a position.
### 3. Value Capture — Beyond "Business Model"
I dropped the phrase "business model" for on-chain assets. It's too narrow.
Value capture in crypto takes forms that don't fit traditional categories: - Protocol fees (Cardano) - PoW mining economics (Ergo, Bitcoin) - Staking mechanisms - Buy-back and burn - Cultural scarcity — when holding becomes identity
The only question that matters: **How does this system keep value inside the network and reward long-term holders?**
No closed loop, no investment. Doesn't matter how loud the community is.
### 4. Sector — Wind Direction, Not Destination
I track sectors to understand where structural tailwinds exist over the next 12-24 months:
- AI × Crypto - RWA - FHE / Privacy computing - DePIN / Robotics - Stablecoin payments - Prediction markets
But sector alone is never a buy signal. It tells me where to look, not what to buy. A project in the hottest sector with no team resilience and no value capture is still a skip.
---
## The Hard Filter: One-Sentence Uniqueness
This is the most important addition to my framework.
**If you can't explain in one sentence why this project is fundamentally different from every other project in its sector, skip it.**
No exceptions.
- Can't articulate it? Probably no moat. - Sounds like three other projects? Probably a copycat. - The answer is "better UX" or "faster"? Not enough.
Examples that pass: - **Pendle**: Splits yield rights from principal — a DeFi interest rate derivatives layer. - **Hyperliquid**: Built its own chain for high-performance perp DEX with on-chain settlement. - **Chainlink**: The data and interoperability infrastructure that RWA on-chain can't bypass.
Examples that don't: - "We're building an AI agent platform" — so are 200 others. Which one survives when the narrative cools? - "Like Uniswap but on [new chain]" — what's the structural difference? - "We have the best community" — that's a claim, not a moat. Show me the bear market receipts.
---
## What Came Out of the Scanner
When I ran my current Alpha Radar scan through this framework, the results were clean:
**Passed (Watchlist)**: Pendle, Hyperliquid, Arweave/AO, Chainlink, Ondo, Helium, Geodnet, Virtual Protocol
**Low Priority (Watching)**: Ethena — I know the product, but I'm cautious about team and operational style.
**Filtered Out**: The majority. AI agent copycats, narrative-surfers, projects that couldn't answer "Why this one?"
The filter removed more than it kept. That's the point.
---
## What This Framework Actually Does
It doesn't predict prices. I've given up on that.
It does three things:
**Reduces noise.** Every day there's a new "paradigm shift." The hard filter kills 80% of them in thirty seconds.
**Maintains consistency.** My standards don't change based on whether Bitcoin is at 30k or 100k. The four dimensions stay the same.
**Speeds up decisions.** Within five minutes I know if something deserves a deep dive or a skip. In a market this fast and this noisy, that matters more than being first.
---
## The Deeper Lesson
After eight years in crypto, I've come to believe something counterintuitive:
The best investments aren't the ones you find first. They're the ones you understand well enough to hold through the worst.
SNEK didn't make my portfolio because I found it early. It's there because I understood its community structure well enough to not sell at -85%.
That understanding comes from having a framework that measures the right things — not hype, not narratives, not follower counts.
**Structure first. Price second. Always.**
Notice what's not in my reference portfolio: no AI agent tokens, no freshly launched narratives, no projects that haven't been through a real winter yet. That's not because those sectors aren't interesting — Virtual Protocol is on my watchlist for a reason. But there's a difference between "this looks promising" and "I've held this through an 85% drawdown and didn't flinch."
The framework is built on the second kind. Everything else has to earn its way in.
This framework will keep evolving. But the core principle won't change: reverse-engineer conviction from what actually survived, not from what looks good on a pitch deck.
Stay Invested in the Game.

item.title: 春晚赞助商变迁与行业生命周期分析报告
item.description: 谁第一次上春晚，行业正在新生；谁连续上镜，行业正在高速发展；谁连续十几年后消失，行业已经夕阳。春晚赞助商名单，就是一部压缩版的中国经济发展史。
item.content:encoded:
> **核心发现：谁第一次上春晚，行业正在新生；谁连续上镜，行业正在高速发展；谁连续十几年后消失，行业已经夕阳。春晚赞助商名单，就是一部压缩版的中国经济发展史。**
---
## 一、总览：春晚赞助商的六个时代
| 时代 | 年份 | 主角行业 | 代表品牌 | 行业信号 | |------|------|----------|----------|----------| | 轻工业时代 | 1984-1994 | 钟表/自行车 | 康巴丝、海鸥、中华自行车 | 新生→繁荣→衰退 | | 标王时代 | 1995-1999 | 白酒/VCD | 孔府宴酒、秦池、沱牌、步步高VCD | 野蛮生长→泡沫破裂 | | 医药插曲 | 2000-2002 | 医药保健 | 哈药六厂、盖中盖、曲美 | 短暂繁荣→监管退潮 | | 家电盛世 | 2003-2019 | 家电制造 | 美的（16次）、格力、海尔 | 长期繁荣→成熟稳定 | | 互联网争霸 | 2015-2024 | 互联网/移动支付 | 微信、支付宝、百度、抖音、快手、京东 | 爆发→饱和→理性化 | | AI+硬科技时代 | 2025-2026 | 机器人/AI/新能源车 | 宇树科技、追觅、豆包、小米汽车 | 新生期，正在起飞 |
---
## 二、逐年详解：品牌上镜编年史
### 第一幕：轻工业时代（1984-1994）——"三转一响"登上国家舞台
**背景：** 改革开放初期，手表、自行车、缝纫机、收音机（"三转一响"）是中国家庭的财富象征，也是婚嫁"硬通货"。
**关键品牌与年份：**
| 年份 | 零点报时/主赞助 | 备注 | |------|----------------|------| | 1984 | 康巴丝石英钟 | **春晚史上第一个赞助商**，用3000只石英钟抵广告费，没花一分现金 | | 1985 | 海鸥手表 | 康巴丝唯一一次被"截胡" | | 1986-1992 | 康巴丝石英钟 | 连续7年回归，累计8次零点报时 | | 1993 | 孔府家酒 | "孔府家酒，叫人想家"——白酒首次突入春晚 | | 1994 | 中华自行车 | 以17亿营收取代康巴丝，成为最后一个"老三件"赞助商 |
**行业生命周期判定：**
- 🟢 **康巴丝（1984首次上镜）= 石英钟行业新生期。** 1983年济南钟表厂刚刚生产出中国第一只石英钟，1984年就登上春晚——典型的行业诞生信号。 - 🔵 **连续8年上镜 = 高速发展期。** 借助春晚，康巴丝年产量从零飙升到200万只，稳居全国第一。 - 🔴 **1994年后消失 = 行业夕阳。** 石英钟不再是稀缺品，康巴丝因商标纠纷一度濒临破产。传统钟表行业全面衰落。
> **规律验证✅：** 首次上镜（新生）→ 连续上镜（高速发展）→ 退出（夕阳）。完美符合。
---
### 第二幕：白酒标王时代（1995-1999）——疯狂的酒杯
**背景：** 1994年央视推出广告竞标制度，"价高者得"。白酒行业恰逢"人情消费"爆发，一瓶体面的白酒是走亲访友的硬通货。
**关键品牌与年份：**
| 年份 | 标王/零点报时 | 竞标金额 | 结局 | |------|-------------|---------|------| | 1995 | 孔府宴酒 | 3079万（第一届标王） | 后来衰落破产 | | 1996 | 秦池酒 | 6666万 | 营收从1.8亿暴增到9.5亿 | | 1997 | 秦池酒 | **3.21亿**（天价） | 被曝外购原酒勾兑，信誉崩塌 | | 1997-1998 | 沱牌曲酒 | 连续两年 | 后改名舍得酒业 | | 1999 | 步步高VCD | —— | VCD行业随后迅速消亡 |
**行业生命周期判定：**
- 🟢 **白酒1993年首次上镜 = 白酒品牌化营销的新生期。** 此前白酒还是区域性散卖产品。 - 🔵 **1995-1997连续霸占标王 = 行业疯狂扩张期。** 秦池一年营收翻5倍。 - 🟡 **1998年后标王不再是白酒 = 第一轮泡沫破裂。** 秦池勾兑丑闻拖累整个山东酒业。 - ⚠️ **但白酒并未真正退出春晚**——它只是换了一批品牌回来（后面详述）。
> **规律验证✅（附加发现）：** 一个行业内部的品牌可以死掉（秦池、孔府宴），但整个行业如果足够强韧，会以新品牌的面貌重返春晚。白酒就是典型案例。
**VCD的昙花一现：**
- 🟢 步步高VCD 1999年首次上镜 = VCD行业最后的辉煌。 - 🔴 此后再未出现 = VCD被DVD和网络视频彻底取代，行业消亡。爱多VCD更是迅速倒闭。
---
### 第三幕：医药保健品插曲（2000-2002）——"一口气上五楼"
**背景：** 白酒标王退潮后，制药和保健品企业迅速填补了春晚广告的真空。
**关键品牌：**
| 品牌 | 上镜时间 | 经典台词/记忆点 | 结局 | |------|---------|----------------|------| | 哈药六厂 | 2000年前后 | 盖中盖："一口气上五楼，不费劲儿" | 后来辉煌不再 | | 曲美减肥药 | 2000年代初 | 大量春晚期间广告 | 因安全问题退市 |
**行业生命周期判定：**
- 🟢 **2000年首次密集出现 = 保健品营销的黄金新生期。** - 🔴 **仅持续2-3年就退潮 = 典型的短命行业信号。** 因广告过度、疗效夸大、监管趋严而迅速降温。
> **规律验证✅：** 上镜时间极短的品类，往往是"风口上的猪"——来得快去得也快，说明行业根基不稳。
---
### 第四幕：家电盛世（2003-2019）——美的的16年"钉子户"
**背景：** 千禧年后，住房改革带动家装需求，家电成为"新三大件"（彩电、冰箱、洗衣机）。中国家电制造业开始打破外资垄断。
**关键品牌与年份：**
| 年份 | 品牌 | 角色 | |------|------|------| | 2003-2014 | **美的** | 11次春晚冠名 | | 2015-2019 | **美的** | 5次零点报时 | | 合计 | **美的** | **累计16次**，春晚历史上最长情的企业 | | 同期 | 格力、海尔 | 也频繁以广告形式出现 | | 同期 | 中国移动、伊利、招商银行 | 多行业品牌开始加入 |
**赞助费飙升轨迹：**
| 年份 | 零点10秒广告价格 | 涨幅 | |------|-----------------|------| | 2005 | 680万元 | 基准 | | 2010 | 5720万元 | 6年翻了8.4倍 | | 2011 | "十秒值半亿" | 每秒572万元 |
**行业生命周期判定：**
- 🟢 **2003年美的首次拿下冠名 = 中国家电品牌化的成熟起步。** 此前家电还以"价格战"为主。 - 🔵 **连续16年 = 行业黄金发展期的完美映射。** 美的营收从2005年的456亿增长到2014年的1400多亿。 - 🟡 **2019年后美的退出零点报时 = 家电行业进入成熟稳定期。** 不再需要靠春晚打知名度，但行业并未衰落——只是增长放缓。
> **规律验证✅（重要变体）：** 连续十几年后退出，并不一定是"夕阳"——对于美的和家电行业来说，更像是"毕业"了。行业太成熟了，不需要这个舞台了。判断是"夕阳"还是"毕业"，要看企业退出后的营收是在下滑还是稳定。
**白酒的"第二春"——从未真正离开：**
白酒在标王时代泡沫破裂后，并没有彻底消失。头部品牌以更精明的方式重返春晚：
| 品牌 | 春晚合作时间 | 方式 | |------|-------------|------| | 红花郎（郎酒） | 2005-2011年连续7年 | 独家冠名，**创最长冠名纪录** | | 国窖1573（泸州老窖） | 多年 | 长期锁定零点报时 | | 茅台 | 多年 | 零点报时 | | 古井贡酒 | 2016年至今连续11年 | 独家特约合作伙伴 | | 洋河梦之蓝 | 2020年至今连续7年 | 零点报时 |
> **深层规律：** 白酒作为整个行业从未离开过春晚——这说明白酒在中国消费体系中的地位极其稳固，与"团圆""宴饮"的节日场景深度绑定。但品牌内部发生了剧烈洗牌：标王时代的秦池、孔府宴全部死掉，活下来的是茅台、五粮液、洋河这些真正有底蕴的头部品牌。2026年白酒赞助商从9家缩减到4家（五粮液、洋河、古井贡、郎酒），说明行业正在进入存量竞争的头部集中阶段。
---
### 第五幕：互联网大厂争霸（2015-2024）——红包大战十年
**背景：** 移动互联网爆发，春晚成为大厂争夺支付入口、流量入口的超级战场。
**互联网春晚独家合作编年史：**
| 年份 | 独家合作伙伴 | 核心玩法 | 战略目标 | 投入金额 | |------|-------------|---------|---------|---------| | 2015 | **微信** | 摇一摇抢红包 | 推广微信支付 | 5亿元红包 | | 2016 | **支付宝** | 咻一咻、集五福 | 反攻微信 | 8亿元红包 | | 2017 | **支付宝** | 集五福 | 巩固支付 | 持续投入 | | 2018 | **淘宝** | 清空购物车 | 电商导流 | 超6亿 | | 2019 | **百度** | 抢红包 | 推广百度App | 9亿元（留存率仅2%） | | 2020 | **快手** | 短视频+红包 | 争夺短视频用户 | 10亿元红包 | | 2021 | **抖音** | 短视频红包 | 国民化 | 12亿元 | | 2022 | **京东** | 实物红包 | 电商+物流 | 15亿元 | | 2023 | 多家分散 | 降温 | 理性回归 | 大幅缩减 | | 2024 | **京东+小红书** | 电商直播+社区 | 内容+电商融合 | 理性投入 |
**第一阶段（2015-2018）：支付入口争夺**
这是互联网春晚营销最经典的阶段。2015年微信红包被马云称为"偷袭珍珠港"——除夕一夜间绑定2亿张银行卡，彻底改变了移动支付格局。支付宝被迫用"集五福"反攻。这个阶段的核心是争夺"钱包入口"。
**第二阶段（2019-2022）：流量/用户争夺**
百度、快手、抖音、京东先后入场，目标从支付转向用户拉新。但效果递减——百度砸了9亿只剩2%留存率，快手花了约50亿总成本，当年却净亏1166亿。
**第三阶段（2023-2024）：降温与理性化**
大厂开始意识到春晚不是万能药，用户增长见顶，ROI难以为继。独家赞助模式瓦解，改为多家分散合作。
**行业生命周期判定：**
- 🟢 **2015年微信首次上春晚 = 移动互联网从工具走向国民基建的标志。** - 🔵 **2015-2022连续8年大厂混战 = 移动互联网的高速扩张与流量争夺期。** - 🟡 **2023年开始降温 = 移动互联网用户增长见顶（月活12.76亿，增速仅2%），进入存量运营期。**
> **规律验证✅：** 互联网大厂从疯狂砸钱到理性退潮，精准映射了移动互联网从增量市场到存量市场的转折。
**同期出现后消失的品牌——行业信号：**
| 品牌 | 上镜时间 | 信号 | |------|---------|------| | 搜狐 | 2009-2010 | 门户网站的最后荣光，之后被移动互联网取代 | | OPPO | 2025年在，2026年缺席 | 手机行业竞争格局变化 | | 石头科技 | 2025年在，2026年缺席 | 扫地机器人品类热度波动 |
---
### 第六幕：AI与硬科技时代（2025-2026）——机器人上春晚
**背景：** AI大模型爆发，具身智能（机器人）成为新风口，新能源汽车竞争白热化。
**2025年春晚首批科技新势力：**
| 品牌 | 行业 | 上镜方式 | |------|------|---------| | 宇树科技 | 人形机器人 | 机器人首次登上春晚舞台 | | 小米SU7 | 新能源汽车 | 品牌植入 | | 华为问界M9 | 智能汽车 | 品牌植入 |
**2026年春晚——科技品牌全面爆发：**
| 品牌 | 行业 | 角色/投入 | |------|------|---------| | **追觅科技** | 智能生态 | 出镜率最高，约2亿赞助，5大子品牌全线亮相 | | **宇树科技** | 人形机器人 | 二度登台，主导武术节目，黑悟空机器人 | | **松延动力** | 机器人 | 四大机器人公司之一 | | **银河通用** | 机器人 | 四大机器人公司之一 | | **魔法原子** | 机器狗 | 追觅生态旗下 | | **火山引擎** | AI云 | 字节旗下，春晚AI云合作伙伴 | | **豆包** | AI助手 | 春晚互动，送机器人大礼 | | 尊界S800 | 智能汽车 | 华为与江淮联合品牌 | | 长城汽车 | 汽车 | 传统车企转型代表 | | **卡游** | 潮玩卡牌 | **春晚史上首次出现卡牌品牌** | | **名创优品** | 潮玩 | **春晚史上首次出现潮玩品牌** |
**四大AI助手的春节红包大战（场外）：**
| 平台 | 投入 | 玩法 | |------|------|------| | 字节豆包 | 最高价码拿下春晚 | 语音/AR红包 | | 腾讯元宝 | 10亿现金红包 | 社交生态 | | 阿里千问 | 30亿免单 | AI点外卖 | | 百度文心 | 5亿 | AI搜索 | | **合计** | **超45亿元** | 争夺AI入口 |
**行业生命周期判定：**
- 🟢 **机器人2025年首次上春晚 = 具身智能行业的新生期标志。** 正如1984年康巴丝代表石英钟行业诞生，2025年宇树科技代表人形机器人走入国民视野。 - 🟢 **AI助手2026年首次大规模春节营销 = C端AI应用的爆发起点。** 正如2015年微信红包代表移动支付爆发。 - 🟢 **潮玩/卡牌2026年首次上春晚 = Z世代消费正式进入主流。** - 🟡 **新能源汽车2025年密集→2026年减少（小米缺席） = 行业从营销驱动转向产品驱动。**
---
## 三、核心规律总结
### 规律一：首次上镜 = 行业新生期信号
| 首次上镜 | 品牌 | 代表行业 | 后续验证 | |---------|------|---------|---------| | 1984 | 康巴丝 | 石英钟 | ✅ 行业从零起步 | | 1993 | 孔府家酒 | 品牌白酒 | ✅ 白酒品牌化元年 | | 1999 | 步步高 | VCD | ✅ VCD行业最后的辉煌 | | 2000 | 哈药六厂 | 医药保健品 | ✅ 保健品营销黄金期 | | 2003 | 美的 | 品牌家电 | ✅ 家电品牌化时代开启 | | 2015 | 微信 | 移动支付 | ✅ 移动支付全民普及 | | 2020 | 快手 | 短视频 | ✅ 短视频国民化 | | 2025 | 宇树科技 | 人形机器人 | ⏳ 正在验证中 | | 2026 | 豆包/元宝 | AI助手 | ⏳ 正在验证中 | | 2026 | 卡游/名创 | 潮玩 | ⏳ 正在验证中 |
### 规律二：连续上镜 = 行业高速发展期
| 品牌 | 连续年数 | 行业状态 | |------|---------|---------| | 康巴丝 | 8年（1984-1992） | 石英钟高速增长，年产突破200万只 | | 美的 | 16年（2003-2019） | 营收从456亿→1400亿+ | | 古井贡酒 | 11年（2016-2026至今） | 品牌知名度67.8%→92.1% | | 洋河梦之蓝 | 7年（2020-2026至今） | 零点报时固定位 | | 红花郎 | 7年（2005-2011） | 创春晚最长独家冠名纪录 |
### 规律三：连续上镜后消失 = 行业衰退/夕阳信号
| 品牌 | 上镜期 | 消失后行业走向 | |------|-------|-------------| | 康巴丝 | 1984-1992 | 石英钟行业萎缩，品牌濒临破产 | | 秦池/孔府宴 | 1995-1997 | 品牌死亡，山东白酒集体陷入低谷 | | 步步高VCD | 1999 | VCD行业消亡 | | 哈药/曲美 | 2000-2002 | 保健品行业受监管打压 | | 搜狐 | 2009-2010 | 门户网站时代终结 |
### 规律四（补充）：行业退出 ≠ 一定夕阳，可能是"毕业"
- **美的退出：** 家电行业成熟，美的自身不再需要春晚。行业稳定，非夕阳。 - **白酒缩减：** 从9家缩到4家。行业进入头部集中期，非消亡，而是洗牌。 - **互联网降温：** 2023年后大厂不再独家烧钱。用户增长见顶，进入存量运营。
**区分"夕阳"和"毕业"的关键指标：** 退出春晚后，行业整体营收是下滑（夕阳）还是稳定/增长（毕业）。
---
## 四、春晚赞助费用变迁——一条疯狂的增长曲线
| 年份 | 事件 | 价格 | |------|------|------| | 1984 | 康巴丝零点报时 | 3000只石英钟（以物易物） | | 1995 | 第一届标王（孔府宴酒） | 3079万元 | | 1997 | 秦池标王 | 3.21亿元 | | 2005 | 美的零点报时 | 680万元 | | 2010 | 美的零点报时 | 5720万元 | | 2015 | 微信春晚红包 | 5亿元红包 | | 2016 | 支付宝春晚 | 2.69亿赞助+8亿红包 | | 2019 | 百度春晚 | 9亿元红包 | | 2020 | 快手春晚 | 约10亿+（总成本约50亿） | | 2026 | 追觅全生态 | 约2亿赞助费 | | 2026 | 机器人独家权益 | 约5亿 | | 2026 | 四大AI助手合计 | 超45亿元 |
> 从3000只表到45亿现金——42年间，春晚的商业价值增长了数万倍。
---
## 五、用春晚赞助商预测行业未来
基于以上规律，对当前上镜品牌的行业预判：
### 正在新生期的行业（刚首次上镜）
| 行业 | 首次上镜年份 | 预判 | |------|------------|------| | 人形机器人 | 2025 | 🟢 行业处于0→1阶段，类似1984年的石英钟。如果未来3-5年持续上镜，将确认高速发展期。 | | C端AI助手 | 2026 | 🟢 类似2015年的微信支付。大厂45亿砸入，正在争夺"AI入口"。但留存率仅12.8%，能否真正国民化仍有悬念。 | | 潮玩/卡牌 | 2026 | 🟢 Z世代消费首次登上国家级舞台。如果明年继续出现，说明这不是昙花一现。 |
### 正在高速发展期的行业（连续上镜中）
| 行业 | 连续上镜 | 预判 | |------|---------|------| | 白酒（头部） | 30年+（换品牌持续） | 🔵 行业极其稳固，但正在从扩张转向头部集中（9家→4家）。 | | 乳制品（伊利蒙牛） | 多年连续 | 🔵 国民消费品地位稳固。 |
### 可能进入成熟/衰退期的行业（开始减少或缺席）
| 行业 | 信号 | 预判 | |------|------|------| | 传统互联网（移动支付/短视频拉新） | 2023年起独家赞助模式瓦解 | 🟡 移动互联网用户增长见顶，行业进入存量运营期。不是夕阳，但告别了高增长。 | | 手机 | 2025年OPPO+华为→2026年仅华为 | 🟡 手机行业增长放缓，品牌集中度提升。 | | 新能源汽车 | 2025年密集→2026年减少（小米缺席） | 🟡 行业从营销战转向产品力竞争，未必是衰退，可能是"理性化"。 |
---
## 六、结论
春晚赞助商名单是中国经济最真实的"心电图"：
1. **1984年的康巴丝** = 中国制造业从零起步的第一声心跳 2. **1995年的白酒标王** = 消费主义的第一次狂欢 3. **2003年的美的** = 中国品牌崛起的黄金时代 4. **2015年的微信红包** = 移动互联网改写国民生活方式 5. **2025年的宇树机器人** = AI与硬科技时代正式开幕 6. **2026年的豆包/元宝/千问** = AI入口争夺战的"珍珠港时刻"
每一次春晚赞助商的换代，都精准踩在了中国经济结构转型的节拍上。
**下一个问题是：2027年的春晚，谁会是新面孔？**
根据当前趋势，最可能的候选行业包括：商业航天、合成生物、脑机接口、低空经济。当这些行业的品牌第一次出现在春晚上时——你就知道，风口来了。
---
*报告整理日期：2026年2月22日* *数据来源：新浪财经、澎湃新闻、36氪、知乎、腾讯新闻、每日经济新闻、财联社等公开报道*

item.title: Stay Human #01 — AI编程就是赌博
item.description: AI 偷走了编程里最滋养灵魂的部分？
item.content:encoded:
> **Stay Human 系列** -- 我亲自翻译的优质英文内容，不是 AI 翻的，是人翻的。翻译本身就是思考。 > > 原文：[AI Coding is Gambling](https://notes.visaint.space/ai-coding-is-gambling/) by Visaint, 2026-03-15
---
## 为什么翻这篇
AI 让编程变得前所未有的容易——输入 prompt，拉一下老虎机，结果就出来了。但作者说了一句让我停下来的话：
**AI 把编程里最滋养灵魂的部分偷走了。**
自己琢磨、自己找到巧妙解法、自己把东西连通——这种满足感，现在变成了收拾 AI 烂摊子。这跟我做 Stay Human 这个系列的初衷完全一样：别让机器替代了思考。
翻译过程中学到的几个词： - **half decent** — 不是「半成品」，是「还不错」（反话） - **intoxicating** — 不只是「舒服」，是「令人上瘾」 - **portfolio** — 这里不是投资组合，是「作品集」
---
## 译文
从去年 11 月以来，我一直都使用 AI 编程，那时人们都发现，AI 已经非常厉害了。AI 确实很擅长瞬间造出一个看着还不错的东西。乍一看甚至让人惊艳，你仔细看就不行了。不过那些真正的细节，那些围绕某个系统但更个性化的内容，现在依然是挑战。
但我现在并不是来评估编程智能体或者对其结果吹毛求疵。我也不是来长篇大论地谈，让 Claude Code 跑了 8 天，攒出来相当于 8 年的项目作品集，这些听起来让人惊艳，也非常完整，输出质量不错。我今天想聊聊情感，聊聊人生如何好好地读过，以及如何滋养心灵。
### 赌博命题
当你发现整个代码库随便怎么改都不费事的时候，那种感觉是会上瘾的。之前我们都被自己的认知与懒惰束缚了。我们需要有个待办的清单列表，然后去权衡这些任务到底需要多少工夫才能完成。得查资料、翻旧代码、重新理解几个月甚至几年前的思路。
但到现在，要么 AI 能完全解决，要么就是它假装自己能够解决。说白了，两次都是装的。但大多数时候结果够用——大致说得过去，偶尔错得离谱。
这些和编程开发大为不同。编程是一项需要极大的思考，以及编写冗长而详细代码的工作。这两项工作，技术上都能实现，前者并不是必须的（你可以直接把它交由 AI 处理），后者当然更不重要了。
但这些能够完美地映射到技术领域最喜欢的机制，那就是赌博。其实就是拉老虎机——输入一条 prompt，赌一个结果。我们刷了这么多年的「下拉刷新」，经济里越来越多的东西都在赌博化。现在连通用人工智能都变成了老虎机。干得漂亮。
但这其实也解释了，为什么对许多人来说，AI 让人令人荒谬地沉迷其中。我当然不会谴责 AI 给我们带来的好处或是担心自己失业。你必须要深刻地理解自己到底在做什么事情，才能够得到想要的结果，让 AI 按照正确的方向做事，而不是你来打各种补丁。我当然也不想解释，AI 到底给我们带来了多少额外的工作。我只是想探究一个更简单的问题。它真的很糟糕。
### 最简单的问题
我把事情分成两类：对灵魂有益的，和没益的。编程开发就是对心灵有益的，即便我做的不理想。寻找我将要做事情的灵感，也归属这一类。我非常喜欢发现别人已经实现的事情，研究我能如何将其应用起来，进行润色、修改和迭代，以满足自己的需要。有了这台无穷抄袭机器，这事就更容易了。
但 **AI 把编程里最滋养灵魂的部分偷走了**——自己钻研琢磨、找到巧妙解法、把东西连通的那种满足感。以前把灵感变成代码，痛并快乐着，现在变成了「擦屁股」，收拾 AI 连接得乱七八糟的烂摊子。
这太没成就感了。当然，能甩锅的人多的是，但最终得自己改。摆脱自己的懒惰，真真正正地和代码互动交流。用我这些年攒下来的老办法——上网找灵感、找巧解。别把自己锁在老虎机里。
### 特殊情况
我并非一个普通程序员。我也没有在大的团队工作过，几乎没有从零开始过项目。互联网上遍地都是关于代码和灵感的信息，这些可供你选择和调整。
我以前在更小规模的团队工作，甚至是一名独立的开发者，所以我很清楚要如何去重构代码，然后再去优化。我不只是个程序员，骨子里我其实是设计师。那我该高兴 AI 让我变成更好的程序员了吗？
这我还真不确定。AI 使我更有信心去尝试新的框架，走出我的舒适圈。我当然也花越来越多的时间在编程开发上。但到底是因为它让我更高效了，还是因为我只是在赌——赌一个我想看到的结果？我是不是一直都在摇那个摇杆，直到我中奖了？
---
*Stay Human, Stay Foolish.*

item.title: AI 是什么，你就是答案
item.description: 去年底我开始折腾 AI 的时候，还没有想过要替代什么。一个接一个，发现以前花钱买的服务，好多都不需要了。
item.content:encoded:
去年底我开始折腾 AI 的时候，还没有想过要替代什么。
就是觉得聊起来舒服，试着丢了几个任务给它，然后一个接一个，发现以前花钱买的服务，好多都不需要了。
这个世界就是这样，你用过之后就回不去了。
---
## 1. 记账：随手记 → OpenClaw + 账单导出
用了十多年随手记。
从毕业到现在，里面密密麻麻的账单，其实我不太喜欢记账这件事。手动一笔笔录入收入支出，太耗功夫了。
现在的做法很简单：
每个月底，从微信、支付宝、招商银行储蓄卡和信用卡各导一份账单。
花 10 分钟整合好，丢给 OpenClaw。
它会自动归类、算出收支、标出订阅情况，比我自己翻半天账单清楚得多，还有各种可视化图表与总结。
以前记账是日常负担，现在是月底花 10 分钟的事。
当初记账是为了积少成多，现在只要关心大方向即可。
---
## 2. 内容创作：Creator Buddy → Rex Ink（自建系统）
去年 11 月，经历了大跌，我还是希望做好内容。
当时找到了 Alex（@AlexFinn）的 Creator Buddy，解决方案确实不错——推文改稿、追踪账号、了解内容表现等。
当时手滑选了年费，花了不少钱，反而倒逼自己输出。
那个时候加密圈的流量还不错，工具用着也顺手。
但现在不一样了。
从 1 月起，我搭了一套自己的系统 Rex Ink：
- 写作风格模板（Voice DNA）：AI 学会了我的语气、句式、禁忌词 - 自动归档分析：每条发出去的推文，表现数据自动回收 - 自动迭代改进：AI 阅读改稿痕迹，每次写得更像我 - 内容日历 + 定时草稿：每天早上 9 点，两条草稿已经躺在 Discord 里等我挑
Creator Buddy 帮我从 0 到 1，Rex Ink 让我从 1 到 N。
区别在于：Creator Buddy 是别人的系统，Rex Ink 是我自己的。
---
## 3. 个人书库：年终总结的启发 → 自建 Library
每到年底，B 站、爱奇艺、芒果 TV 等都会出年终总结。
设计非常不错，有时发个朋友圈炫一下，然后就没有然后了。
平心而论，我想要的可不是一年看一次的回忆杀，而是一个随时能查的记录：看过什么书、看过什么影视、走过什么路。
这两天花了点时间，搭了自己的内容仓库。
能同步读书笔记，能按主题归档，能随时搜到三个月前看的那篇文章到底讲了什么。
全靠 AI，数据全在本地。
---
## 4. 资产管理：有知有行 → API 同步 + AI 分析
以前用有知有行管投资组合，体验很不错，计算方法也好。
但我的情况比较特殊——传统资产和加密资产分开管，数据散在不同地方。
现在加了 API 同步，定期自动更新。
传统资产从券商获取，加密资产从交易所获取，汇到一个面板里。
AI 帮我算总仓位、各类资产占比、跟基准的偏离度，还会定期提醒如何最大化安全地提升收益。
不用再手动输数字，也不用再打开各种 App 拼拼凑凑。
---
## 5. 播客学习：Podwise → AI 行动建议
去年年底发现 Podwise，各种内容一应俱全，也非常方便。
现在的做法多了一步：
先用 OpenClaw 的 Summarize Skill 抓取核心观点和关键问题。
然后结合我自己的情况——持仓、关注的赛道、当前的决策节点——让 AI 给出具体的行动建议。
之前写的几篇文章，其实就是这么来的，特别是听了孟岩和李继刚的对谈，AI 帮我把他们的思考和我的处境做了交叉，直接输出了可以输出的方向。
现在学习阅读目的变了，播客不再是「听完觉得有道理」，是「听完知道该做什么」。
---
## 6. 医疗健康：从零开始建个人健康档案
这个是熬了几次夜之后的感想。
身体的事不能等出了问题再查。
前两天第一次做胃镜，突然发现原来我也到了 35 岁关键节点了。
周一开始建自己的健康数据库：基础信息、每次体检报告、病历记录，全部录进去。
目前还在早期，先把自己的跑通，后面会扩大到家庭——老人、孩子的健康数据也接进来，做到有异常能提前提醒，不靠记忆靠系统。
这件事没什么花哨的，就是把数据攒起来，让 AI 帮你看趋势、给建议。
---
## 7. 家庭教育：从英语启蒙开始的个性化教育
这件事先从女儿的英语启蒙开始，也是我从家长会上得到的启发，希望她能够上小学前熟读英语，毕竟她父亲当年可没有这么好的条件。
我的设想是，每天根据她当前的水平，AI 推送当天的任务：一首儿歌、一本绘本、一个小游戏。
完成了就打卡，没完成自动降低第二天的量，每周反馈、迭代、调整。
如果这条路跑通了，后面可以扩展到任何科目——数学、认知、甚至家庭教育方面的东西。
AI 真正做到了私教，等孩子长大也能有足够多的数据分析，成为家庭教育不可或缺的部分。
---
## 8. 知识管理：Flomo → Obsidian
用了快五年 Flomo，说实话是个好产品。
但 Markdown 生态发展到今天，纯文本文件的优势已经碾压式地显现了。
我花了一天完成了迁移。
现在我的知识仓库长这样：每天从早到晚，早报、晚报、研究笔记、投资日记、系统文档，全部自动归档成 Markdown 文件。
我只需要做一件事：往里面补我自己的想法。
剩下的——归类、索引、跨主题关联——Agent 团队自动完成。
多端同步，全文可搜，文件归我不归平台。
以前总觉得切换工具麻烦，真正切过来之后才发现，麻烦的不是迁移，是一直留在一个承载不了你数据量的地方。
---
## 如果你也想试
一月初，我想明白了一件事：
现在 AI 的能力，已经能做到真正的一人一面。
每个人得到的产品和服务都可以是独一无二的。
如果你也想开始，我的建议是：
**先从一个你已经在用、但用得不爽的痛点开始。**
找一个痛点最明显的——可能是记账，可能是播客笔记，可能是孩子的学习计划——先用 AI 跑通这一个。
跑通了你就会发现：第二个、第三个，自然就来了。
将数据放自己手里，不用追求完美，先跑起来就好。
最近正好在看《Show Your Work》这本书。
我从未纠结有多少人关注到我的东西。
如果这篇文章里的任何一个做法，能让你少花一点时间在重复劳动上，多花一点时间在真正重要的事情上，这就够了。
当然，我的思路是，早花钱早研究早享受，因为钱迟早都要没的。
祝你如愿。

item.title: Why 2026 Is the Year I'm Rebuilding My Wealth Strategy (And You Should Too)
item.description: How do I grow my wealth when currencies fluctuate, economies shift, and the rules of money seem to change every few months?
item.content:encoded:
## Introduction
Last night, I did something I'd been putting off for months—I uploaded my family's entire financial performance from the past year to an AI model.
Why? Because I needed an unbiased perspective on a goal that's been keeping me up at night: **achieving an 8%+ annual return while protecting my assets in an increasingly unpredictable global economy.**
If you're reading this, chances are you're also wondering: *How do I grow my wealth when currencies fluctuate, economies shift, and the rules of money seem to change every few months?*
Let me walk you through my journey and the strategic pivot I'm making this year—one that might inspire your own financial breakthrough.
## My Current Reality Check
Here's where my assets stand today:
- **Stablecoins (USDT):** 25% - **BTC/Crypto assets:** 15% - **Index Funds:** 20% - **Gold:** 5% - **Domestic Fixed Income:** 30% - **Liquid Cash:** 5%
On paper, it looks diversified. But here's what I realized: **I was playing defense when I should have been playing strategic offense.**
## The Two Questions That Changed Everything
### Question #1: Where Will You Actually Live?
This isn't philosophical—it's financial.
Your lifestyle location determines your burn rate. I've watched friends chase lower living costs only to sacrifice opportunities that could 10x their income. Others stayed in expensive cities drowning in overhead.
**My principle:** Freedom means owning your time. That only happens when **income consistently exceeds expenses**, no matter where you plant roots.
Before optimizing returns, optimize your cost structure. Otherwise, you're building a wealth engine with a leak in the tank.
### Question #2: Which Country's Future Are You Betting On?
Here's the uncomfortable truth: **Every asset you hold is a vote of confidence in a specific nation's economy.**
Hold dollars? You're betting on America. RMB investments? You're bullish on China. Gold? You're hedging against them all.
With de-globalization accelerating and currency wars heating up, I can't afford to be naive about this anymore.
## What the AI Told Me (And Why It Hurt)
After analyzing my portfolio, Gemini's advice was brutally clear:
### ❌ Stop Letting Cash Rot Holding 25% in stablecoins earning minimal interest is a silent wealth killer. Inflation (real inflation, not official numbers) is eating that value daily.
### ✅ Shift to "Dollar-Denominated Core Assets" Instead of passive USDT, deploy capital into: - **BTC/ETH** for crypto exposure - **US equity ETFs** like QQQ (Nasdaq-100)
**The logic:** When the dollar weakens (likely through 2026 as the Fed continues rate cuts), risk assets denominated in dollars typically rise. You offset currency debasement with asset appreciation.
It's not about abandoning dollars—it's about **holding productive dollars, not sleeping ones**.
## My New Asset Allocation Strategy
After weeks of analysis, here's my revised framework:
### Geographic/Asset Distribution: - **US Assets:** 55% - **China Assets:** 30% - **Gold/Hard Assets:** 15%
### Tactical Shifts I'm Making Now:
**1. Create New Cash Flows First** - Monetize X (Twitter) creator program - Launch commercial products around my expertise - Build income streams that compound independently
**2. Reduce Domestic Fixed Income** That comfortable 30% in low-risk domestic products? I'm gradually reducing it to 15-20%, redeploying into assets with asymmetric upside.
**3. Dollar-Cost Average Into Core Assets** - Increase BTC allocation from 15% to 25% - Add systematic purchases of gold (targeting 15% total) - Enter US AI/tech ETFs with monthly contributions
**4. Build the "Transition Portfolio"** In times of global economic restructuring, liquidity is power. I'm keeping 10% in true liquid reserves—not for safety, but for opportunistic deployment when others panic.
## The Three Principles Guiding My 2026 Wealth Strategy
### Principle #1: Diversification Is Not Safety—It's Intentionality
Don't spread money around randomly. Each allocation should answer: *"What scenario does this protect or profit from?"*
### Principle #2: Currency Risk Is Real, Not Theoretical
Single-currency exposure is a silent killer. Even if your home currency feels stable, global capital flows can destroy purchasing power overnight.
### Principle #3: Cash Flow Beats Cash Reserves
The best defense against economic uncertainty isn't a bigger savings account—it's multiple income engines that run regardless of market conditions.
## Your Action Plan: 5 Steps to Start Today
Ready to audit your own strategy? Here's how to begin:
1. **Map your current allocation** by currency and asset class 2. **Calculate your true burn rate** including lifestyle inflation 3. **Identify which countries/currencies** you're overexposed to 4. **Research one core asset** in a different economic zone 5. **Start with 5%** - test reallocation with a small portion before going all-in
## The Bottom Line
We're living through a monetary transition that happens maybe twice per century. The strategies that worked in the 2010s won't carry you through the 2020s.
**This isn't about getting rich quick—it's about staying wealthy when the rules change.**
My goal of 8%+ growth isn't aggressive—it's necessary just to preserve real purchasing power. Yours might be different, but the principle remains: **adapt or get left behind.**
The beautiful part? You don't need to predict the future perfectly. You just need to position yourself so that multiple futures work in your favor.
---
**What's one change you're making to your financial strategy this year?** Drop a comment—I'd genuinely love to hear your approach. We're all figuring this out together.
*And if this resonated, share it with someone still keeping all their eggs in one currency basket. They'll thank you later.*
**Now go audit that portfolio. Your future self is counting on you.**

item.title: A New Leaf
item.description: The birth of a product requires all forces, and I am glad to be part of it.
item.content:encoded:
Finally, our long-awaited product has come to the fore.
Four months of painstaking efforts is no longer an illuison.
Coincidentally, it was right in the middle of the College Entrance Examination even though we had tried so hard to avoid major events for a smooth launch.
All my colleagues were in a frenzy in their Wechat Moments, but I was more tranquil than others. Unwilling to admit, we could be better and the demons of my perfectionsim devoures my tinkling excitements.
What is your thrilling moment that consumes the very best of you?
As a Product Manager, it was my honor to share the bitter-sweet moments of our initiation.
What still lingers on my mind is that when it was delegated on schedule, we were far away from preparedeness. The idea of product evolution is commonly perceived as the most efficient weapon to swim with the tide.
Before our decison, the previous product has survived in the swarm of sports and health applications for two years without tillitating features.
When put into my hands, it was less satisfying than expected. As a result, I was perplexed and disappointed, but soon I had to slowly accommodate to the status quo.
After our first round of financing deal, the chance has finally arrived at our doorsteps. The investors were more anxious to deliver a handy product with perfect UI experience and interaction. It seemed our old application could no longer lead the charge.
So the journey began in the late January of 2018, right before our Chinese New Year.
At the same time, I was preoccupied with the Product Notes Column and promptly rejuvenated the product design with some unrealistic ideas. Our initiation is thus accelerated.
We did not have our roadmap in the beginning, but in everyone's mind palace. I formulated a basic project schedule where we could easily get a glimpse of our assignments.
The way I carried out in the research and analysis phase is my deep-rooted methodology which has been shaped from different perspectives in my career. Despite the clear understanding of the tennis market and the personas, I would like to jump at the chance to reflect on our business models as well as the creative solution we claimed to tackle the problem.
The result is contrary to my anticipation. Best as the application could be, the key element in the whole picture is the number of tennis courts currently in our platform. It was our Damocles' Sword from day one. Product is not the overriding power that wins the market.
Once I have conjured up the solutions, I then moved on to some interesting interactions and movements. I have been an aivd admirer of myriads of beautiful and charming designs. Asthentic Sense is what our traditional appliction lacks.
Therefore, together with other two collegues, I has repeatedly learned from the best products in the world. Their creativity is more mindblowing and breathtaking than mine.
After rounds of brainstorms, we have come to an agreement that this new application shall be its own king. The whole process sounds impeccable, but it was behind the scenes. I had to grab my paper and rush to their seats for continued cooperation.
When all was set, it was the perfect time for our engineers to stage.
More often than not, we had our disputes and conflicts. What impressed me most was their sysmatic framework. They could always challenge me with following questions
> Have you ever considered the scalability of this feature?
> How could we accomodate all our products and obey the same rules so as to aviod mistakes?
> If the new application is released, what about the old one?
At the thought of confrontations, it become my habit that every time I tried to expound my ideas, I would demonstrate and prepare for some unforeseen scenarios. It was a delicious taste of my congitive ability and the I would swallow the defeat with ease.
Days have elapsed with our countdown banner hanging on the wall, as if syncrotising our atmosphere and sympathize with all the graduates.
Before the final release, we had tested a couple of times from the obvious bugs to the compability among the product stream.
One day after the release, I sribbled an email expressing my gratitude to the team.
Finally, it was the dawn of both the company and my career.
On on hand, the company strives to deliver the best experiences in booking and smart experience.
On the other hand, it symbolizes my advanced mastery of products as well as its implications.
As I digest our long journey, I become more obessed with the underlying logic.
The following thoughts summarizes all.
- Always delve into human emotions before we leap
Our application, in essence, aims to gratify our tennis users in that whenever you are in want of a suitable hour, you are welcome to enjoy the speedy booking and smart services. It is called gratification. As a result, all we endevour to do is to deliver the quickness and user-friendliness.
- Speedy Execution is everything
Our brainstorms are essential but it severely delayed our progress when everyone was eager to prove his opinion. Our CEO later recognized this ominous signal and then let our team do the rest.
Besides, the development procedure deprived more capable collegues of professional expertise and learning. Our incentive mechanism shall be upgraded.
- Prepare for the worst scenarios
After the Apple Store release, we were so thrilled to downloaded the lastest app, however, when we tried to update, it stipulated that we had violated certain rules and we provide requisite materials for further inquiries. This incident was quite unexpected, and we took three days to negotiate with the Apple staff. Luckily, the chao ceased. However, it was absolutely necessary to prepare for the worst scenarios and their corresponding recipes.
The birth of a product requires all forces, and I am glad to be part of it.
The future is ours to bend.

item.title: A Short Lesson with SNEK
item.description: It's hard to find a memecoin I clearly understand every bit of the story other than $SNEK. And I can do much more within my power and it's exhilarating to work with all the legends.
item.content:encoded:
You may be curious when to sell after the last post.
Tbh I sold my $SNEK three times and double down since April.
Do I regret? Of course I do.
My 1k presale would be 750k $ADA now.
So it's crucial to bet as long as you're comfortable👇
### Prarabolic Price Action
Everyday there is some unfamilar altcoins pumping and you cann't resist to follow their steps.
Even you have wildest predictions on the price action, profits is profits.
I unloaded my $SNEK as it soared 10x-20x in the first 3 days.
It was my first attempt with memecoins and I didn't know how everything would go.
Then it took off violently and I bought back higher.
### When you made a mistake, even if it is a right one
Investment is about probability.
In all your hypotheses, if a small probability event really happens, it's time to get out.
For instance, you have full trust in the team but later something that you may never imagine happens.
I did poorly on this as the violent crash after Minswap LP $SNEK farming incentives frightened me out.
I still remember the night when I hit the sell button after a 80% correction in several hours.
### Making your life & family better
Think clearly why you're here in the first place and how much you're willing to take.
Had I not been blind to all the gains and family stuff, the last cycle would be so kind to me.
After market ran back in December, I talked with my wife and friends about $SNEK, it has become my second largest holding.
I decided to stay out for a while as I haven't made a good trade after 2021 and hope $ADA will have its glory.
### Finding superior choices
Portfolio is your opportunity cost.
It's like whether you decide to HODL #BTC, $ADA or altcoins.
Superior choices are those with huge upside when you win and limited downside when you lose.
After memecoin PvP, $ADA underperforming and liqudity crisis in ecosystem, I realized $SNEK is always the king.
So I reallocated and double down.
My bear case for $SNEK is it outperforms $ADA.
It's hard to find a memecoin I clearly understand every bit of the story other than $SNEK.
And I can do much more within my power and it's exhilarating to work with all the legends.
See you in the Year of $SNEK.

item.title: Anniversary to Shanghai: Sketches and Chaos
item.description: Life is much harder to digest in a place like this.
item.content:encoded:
It was early morning, but the clouds would not give their way to the slowly ascending sun. The compartment became more turbulent and less lively after the protracted trip. Staying awake all night, I was all the more thrilled at the thought of landing a veritable metropolis. With a warm glimpse of her lying on my side, I repeatedly told myself: please take good care of her, and be a man who will never shrink. Meanwhile, a message came, and it was from my dad. He had every confidence in our fresh start, “the morning must be terrific, so enjoy every single day.” I just knew that they are always right behind us.
So we got off, and a panorama of the charming city unfolded itself in front of us. Before we could fully appreciated the beauty of the teeming world, we were relieved to rent a place barely satisfactory thanks to ZH’s generosity, and remained sanguine about what might be in store. The following months proved to be mundane yet precious. It was definitely the first time we had lived together and looked after each other. Only when we had truly shared the same roof could we become more senstive to the habits and feelings.
Maybe it is incumbent for me to flaunt her in many regards and forgive me for the blatant happiness. Right now, I would be willing to present several virtuous qualities for the record.
I am fortunate enough to handle many excruciating challenges because she is a considerate and strategic adviser.
I am fortunate enough to get through the dark tunnel before the sun shines because she is a compassionate joy of mylife.
I am fortunate enough to taste aplethora of delicious delicacies because she is a great chef without doubt.
Myriads of enduring memories, it occurs to us, are no less fortuitous reminders of the restless youth than the vexatious harbingers of the implacable journey since we touched the magic land of Shanghai. Like every intrepid fighter who always stares down any disparaging judgement or discouraging outcome in his struggle of life, our story is no exception as well, inundated with intermingled feelings.
Frequently, I am taken to mull over the past experiences and dig into the submerged motivations that fires me up so far. One of the straightforward gists would be our inexorable faith of making a difference in the world despite of our insignificant presence. Still, the brutal law of survival of the fittest promulgated by Social Darwinism is so prevailing that we even feel powerless to confront ourselves when no one is around. Sense of inferiority and guilty take hold of our minds, repudiating every single achievement and crushing every original idea. We are then sunk into silence again… However, if we are to overturn the adverse mentality, it is a point of honour to remember: the most uncouth of our afflictions is to despite our being. Do keep fighting whenever we have the courage and strength to fight.
At least from my own perspective, “If Only”is not an excuse. This essay is a clear symptom of procrastination, which has invaded my self-defence mechanism and torn the habit long kept apart. Being manipulated by personal weaknesses in character stymies further insights and execution. Provided we are well cognizant of intricate humanity, chances of success are not thin altogether. While one’s piligrimage, untold and unspeakable, is destined to be buried inside, sharing with others could be a spontaneous reaction. The next time life does not crack a smile at us, pursue something that genuinely is interesting and forget the cumbersome tasks. A hand to hold, an ear to listen, or a heart to rest, the choice is all yours.
Finally, the aniversary may live for a day, but will stay forever.
Wish Us Good Luck !

item.title: 天涯路远，终会相逢
item.description: 古之学者必有师。师者，所以传道受业解惑也。
item.content:encoded:
初一开学那天，大家顺利报到，班主任开始了他的第一次安排座位工作。初次相遇，这个老师似乎有些严厉，四十多岁，声音洪亮且有穿透力，有种不怒自威的神态。
我心中暗想，看来这三年我得好好表现了。
在所有人都安排妥当之后，我孤独地站在门口，心中诧异，我鼓起勇气问班主任我的坐位在哪。他突然一愣，望着已经坐满的教室，最终把我安排在了倒数第一个位置。要知道，在家长的眼中，排在最后可不是什么好事，这可能意味着你无法看清老师在黑板上的笔记与解答，未来的学习质量恐怕要受到影响。
说起选座，这一安排可能比较奇葩，刚开始由班主任随机选择，而后通过每一次的期中或是期末考试成绩而定，前十名有优先选择的权利，其他位置则自由编排。
我默默地坐下了，心中有些不服，等着瞧吧，我一定会证明自己。
后来，我自认为学习能力尚可，班上 60 多位同学，第一次期中考试我如愿以偿地进入了班级前十名，班主任有些惊讶，因为我与他们不属于同类人，至少我的成长环境与他们不同。自此，我的名字应该被彭老师记住了。
他是位数学老师，教学方法严谨，习惯让大家提前准备，按照教材一步一步去练习并且相互监督。他的教学名声在外，我们班也是参加奥数培训并且获奖最多的，周末很少开设补习班，只是对于那些有待短时间提升成绩的同学。
除了教学，他的日常工作更是忙碌，脾气也很大，原则性极强，每天下午放学前都要开班会，总结当日的班级管理以及出现的问题。其他班的班主任可不是这样，每天我们望着其他班同学背着书包一打铃就欢快地回家，心中的怨念可是不少。
至今在脑海中记忆最深刻就是他在班级大扫除时对那些喜欢偷懒的同学说的话：**这个社会绝对不会包容那些好吃懒做之辈，人们都说，老实人吃亏，在我这里，老实人永远不会吃亏。**
那一刻，他的话震撼到了当场的每个人，我第一次觉得原则这东西还有些用，至少潜意识认为，原来我们还是有公平可言的。
三年间，我也曾因为逃课被叫到办公室里挨训，我也曾因为犯错而被罚站在教室最后，我也曾因为优秀在家长会上被口头表扬，点点滴滴，记忆绵长。
再后来，今年过年，我和 W 回到了曾经上学的地方，看着母校的变化，看着曾经上课的教室，看着塞满试卷的课桌，感慨万千，唯一不变的就是记忆中的那位严厉却有温度的彭老师。
---
告别初中，我再一次地幸运地进入了重点班级，这次的班主任是一位富有经验的英语老师，一看就是饱读诗书之人，声音低沉却有磁性，颇有大家风范，第一感觉就是这位老师不简单。
果然，余老师的教学与众不同，除了课本学习之外，他还另行准备了很多《新概念英语》或是其他地道英文文章，这些内容相比教材而言，难度大了许多，可是我却很喜欢，毕竟对于英语一如既往的热爱让我对于任何新鲜事物都无所畏惧。
然而，我唯一害怕的就是开口说英语，要知道，高考可不考口语，我的全部动力来自于对于余老师的尊敬与信任，完全被他流利与标准的发音给迷住了。听他们说，余老师还保持着遇到不懂的单词或是语法查字典的习惯，平日将大部分时间都放在英语上。
我如饥似渴地学习，那时的英语已经展现出了与他人不同的实力，心中定了目标，英语成绩自然有所提升。高一下学期的期中考试，余老师满意地将我的作文当作范文让全部同学欣赏并且点评，那时简直欣喜若狂，但还是要保持冷静。
余老师对于班级管理一直都是较为随意，然而，与其他重点班相比，课堂学习与自习时氛围完全比不了。那晚，他真的生气了，全班人待在教室，他站在讲台上，和我们说起了季羡林先生在读书时的往事：**季老精通多国语言，无论在何种学习环境下，他都坚持不懈，克服种种困难，最终完成巨作、享誉盛名。**此时，他的心中五味杂陈，或许他实在理解不了，为什么如今如此优渥的学习环境，大家却一味地放任自己的前途不顾？
我能够体会他为我们着想的心情，相信那晚的所有人也感同身受。
后来，我们有所改变，尽力不给他丢人，也取得了一些成绩，至少那些不和的声音消失了；
后来，文理分科，我选择文科，告别了与余老师共同战斗的日子。偶尔在球场上望见了几次，他依旧行色匆匆，沉浸在自己的世界中。
再后来，我考上大学，离开了高中生活，却最终未能鼓起勇气向余老师当面道谢。
**他可能永远不知道，班上有一个男生十分崇敬他，以他为榜样，却始终将这份感激之情埋在心底。**
---
彭老师和余老师对我的人生影响极大，从他们身上我学到了太多，现在回想起来，他们是真正的传道受业解惑的良师。
此刻又到了一年一度的教师节了，每个人都会怀念起自己的年少往事与学习经历，从小到大，我们都在跟随老师，学习知识，考入大学，步入社会，前二十年的人生轨迹大抵如此。我们整天将学习挂在嘴边，却一直忘记悉心教导我们的灵魂工程师们，心中愧疚不已。
在自己懵懂无知的年代能够得到几位老师的言传身教实属幸事，回想起来，他们教会我的远远不止学习这件事。
**学习不仅是学习知识，更是学习如何学习，以及为人处世之道。**
韩语在《师说》中的经典名篇时至今日同样醍醐灌顶：
> 古之学者必有师。师者，所以传道受业解惑也。人非生而知之者，孰能无惑？惑而不从师，其为惑也，终不解矣。生乎吾前，其闻道也固先乎吾，吾从而师之；生乎吾后，其闻道也亦先乎吾，吾从而师之。吾师道也，夫庸知其年之先后生于吾乎？是故无贵无贱，无长无少，道之所存，师之所存也。
翻看以前的记录，每年总会在这个特殊的日子里写下几句感恩的文字，最后一次却是在本科毕业之时，心中莫名的伤感。我自认为不是一个十分活络或是热情的人，很多人或者事情只会默默地记在心里，很少公开或是主动联系对方，对家人如此、对朋友如此，对老师依旧如此.
这一毛病很早我就看透，也恨自己为何性格如此，说是要改变，却迟迟未能行动，这些年或多或少地联系过以前的老师或是朋友，然而更多的是躲在通讯录的一角，默默地关注着他们。总是怕给别人添麻烦，以致于在毕业的几年中只是偶尔联系。
今日，我希望换一种方式纪念或是表达自己的情感，因为教师节对我而言有着不一样的意义，也就有了上面的故事。
---
最后，当然不能少了人生中最重要的老师------我的老爸，他是真正的大学老师。自从我记事开始，我就在大学中混迹，少不更事，喜欢跟着老爸后面去蹭课，上课内容我真的半个字都听不懂，只是发现老爸很厉害，能够同时让这么多人专心听讲。
小时候，老爸带着我骑单车、打乒乓球、下象棋，似乎所有技能他都精通，这让我十分羡慕，两人作为对手，早已交手多次，我胜少负多，我印象中的父亲就是盖世英雄，家里的大小事务都是由他一手包办，我只管专心念书就好。
慢慢长大，我们开始有了观念冲突或是矛盾，大多数时候老爸还是会放手让我自由选择，这让我十分感激。
二十多年，我们经历了太多，始终未变就是父亲：
**作为老师，他一如既往地认真为同学答疑解惑、更新教材、批改试卷；**
**作为班主任，他一如既往地用心为同学解决生活难题、提供就业帮助；**
**作为父亲，他一如既往地树立榜样，尽可能地给出自己的宝贵经验教训。**
**我渐渐懂得，人生的路很长，要想独立自由，首先要学会的就是做人做事。**
再后来，上个月与父母临别之际，老爸语重心长地对我说：
> 我们年纪大了，只能提供力所能及的帮助，未来的人生道路要靠你们自己走下去，男人要有担当与责任，希望你们能越来越好。
好的，我会的。
祝福全天下的老师们教师节快乐！

item.title: 一位亿万富豪的创业求生
item.description: 成功的确不是偶然。有时间抱怨，不如取长补短，培养商业思维能力，面对一切信息，比别人多想一步。创业不是为了证明什么，只是用对了方法。
item.content:encoded:
忙里偷闲，这些天看完了几位朋友多次推荐《富豪谷底求翻身》这部纪录片。
> 在一个陌生的城市，100美元、一辆破皮卡、零人脉，如何创立一家百万估值的企业？这部纪录片讲述了一位美国的亿万富豪，佯装身份、孤身一人前往美国伊利市，白手起家、从零开始创业的过程。
一集预告片加上八集正片，差不多花了 4 天时间看完。在预告片中，他们的初衷就是为了证明，美国梦依旧鲜活，勤劳努力，必然成就一番天地。
节目组与 Glenn Stearns 的约定以 90 天为限，若是无法成功创造出一家百万估值的企业，他将自己投入百万真金白银。虽说于他而言，百万美元如九牛一毛，于普通人而言，这却是一夜暴富。
> 创业不是为了证明什么，只是用对了方法，会给很多人带来正面的影响。
这场挑战令人激动。认真看过全集后，不排除节目组有作秀的成分，毕竟制造冲突和矛盾才有足够的话题性，例如二手轮胎、卖车与装修卖房。有些人认为，这一切都过于巧合，现实中并不可能发生，一定是有人安排。另外就是，不给工资就能招募这么多能人，要么别人已知其是亿万富翁，要么就是节目组摄像机加持，否则根本做不到这些。
要挑毛病，吹毛求疵，几乎是我们的惯性，很多事情更应当关注思维方式。
**做错是常态，做对是苛求。**
**用心发掘机会，寻找买家，匹配需求，达成交易，这是商业社会最重要的生存逻辑。**
## 一、故事逻辑
**1、生存阶段（第 1 周）：**
落魄伊利（Erie），被迫到救助站，第一时间寻找机会打零工、找工作，顺便认识当地人脉（RJ）。
开车全城寻找二手轮胎，卖出好价格，覆盖生存成本。
一周时间成功达成目标，租房两个月开始真正思考创业机会。
**2、组建团队（第 2-3 周）：**
前往当地创业孵化中心，寻找市场机会，瞄准咖啡与啤酒这样的快消领域。
决定从啤酒做起，面试各种岗位的求职者（Matt/Christine/Mike/Ashley 等）。
调整商业模式，决定当地啤酒加上烧烤。
**3、筹集启动资金（第 4-8 周）**
先二手车转手，获得房产首付，成功贷款一万美元；
同时，邀请 Dawn Van 翻新房屋，通过卖二手房赚取利润 3 万元。
**4、制定计划与时间节点（第 4 -11 周）**
从第 30 天开始，确认品牌为 Underdog，几乎所有工作都围绕着最终开业进行；
依次倒推每个节点大家的工作任务，包括与当地啤酒厂合作、烧烤炉制作、品牌营销等。
**5、烧烤节比赛（第 12 周）**
邀请各种能人加入团队，合理分配任务，虽说是第一次参赛，从筹备到现场表现都很厉害，最终利用烧烤节利润支付装修店面费用，同时获奖赢得知名度。
**6、Underdog BBQ 餐厅开业（第 90 天）**
打造团队，替换主厨 Christine（情绪与沟通失控），确认核心成员与利益分配；
开业当天就是第 90 天，向团队成员坦白真相；
当地评估员来了解情况，最终估值 75 万美元；
Glenn投入一百万美元，成立慈善创业基金会，鼓励创业与美国梦精神。
## 二、全面复盘
**1、以始为终，善于借力**
Glenn 从第一天就制定清晰的时间计划，以开店时间为 Deadline，往前推算多长时间里先赚到温饱所需的钱，怎么找投资机会，怎么赚到第一笔投资资金，赚大钱的时间点是什么......每个环节环环相扣，哪个失败都会造成创业失败。Glen 基本上是严格按照时间计划走的，虽然一路跌宕起伏，问题频出，但是他能当机立断，寻求 Plan B，及时把握关键的时间点。
> 做好变通的准备，不是每笔生意都能照着计划走，好的生意人永远都准备好应付突来的变化和失败，经营和创业也是如此。
他选择的项目，一开始就免费利用当地的创业资源，比如市场调研、创业办公室等。再就是选择当地特色的啤酒，后来因为时间限制，拿不到牌照，然后转变策略，终于将啤酒和烧烤结合在一起。
他的确不懂啤酒和烧烤，但懂得利用资源。
> 我就是要不断找比自己聪明的人来弥补自己的不足。你得承认别人在某些方面比你优秀，而不要认为自己无所不能。
> 最重要的经营原则就是人力资本，能成功是因为身边围绕的都是比自己聪明的人。
**2、买家优先，学会谈判**
> 毕生信奉的买卖原则就是先找到买家，其他的水到渠成。
基本思路，就是低价买进 > 包装 > 高价卖出。不管是买卖二手车，还是买卖二手房，都是如此。这里面还有一个关键点，就是要懂得怎么销售，能预判大概能以多少价格成交，再去进货。卖货前，记得清理和包装一下，放一个好的位置，才能卖个好价钱。
谈判技巧更是厉害，一是语言技巧，二是肢体语言等。
比如他拿着现金去买二手车，直接晃着钥匙去卖二手车，就是一个很有用的技巧
因为这意味着只要对方回答 YES，就能马上实现愿望（卖家想快速变现、买家想买到自己想要的东西），很难被拒绝的。就算心里特别想达成目标，嘴上也要装成不急不忙，让对方看不到自己在想什么。
> 谈一笔五亿美元的信贷贷款和谈一笔五美元的买卖没有区别，关键是察言观色，说服他们需要你卖的东西。
**3、打造团队，收买人心**
